moves.title: Agent-org roster + scheduler + Slack retirement (agent-org Phase 2)
moves.note: 2026-07-19: 44 role agents live via config/agents.json + jarvis-agents :9209 — the original 19 (9 social-media, 5 accountant, 5 legal) plus a REAL C-suite (cto/cmo/cfo/clo/coo/cro, weekly roll-ups) with reports_to rewired to route through them, plus seo-specialist-* and site-medic-* on the same 9-platform roster; verified end-to-end (reports route to inbox, deck Hierarchy tab renders the real tree). jarvis-slack disabled, NOTIFY_SLACK_LEGACY=0, deploy-gate repointed. 158 watchdog alert cutover to gateway /internal/notify is DONE (jarvis-heartbeat.timer on 158, scoped JARVIS_HEARTBEAT_TOKEN_vapron158, verified live). REMAINING: Craig to flip AGENTS_MODE dry-run→live after reviewing one dry-run cycle.

moves.title: Enable cloud executor (after #8 + creds)
Turn on self-repair (jarvis → cloud)
moves.note: 2026-07-20: deploy-gate.js auto-dispatches a fix job via the existing LOCAL/remote /dispatch path (not the cloud executor, #11 stays off) when a post-deploy GateTest scan finds critical issues. Guarded by consecutiveBlockedRuns() — caps at 2 consecutive auto-fix attempts per platform before escalating to a human alert instead of looping forever. Craig's ruling: "deploy, push, merge = healthy up to date system", no waiting on him to notice a broken deploy.

moves.title: Auto-dispatch + guardrail layer
moves.note: 2026-07-20: guardrail piece partly covered by #12's consecutiveBlockedRuns cap + a new GET /jobs/loops stuck-dispatch detector in orchestrator.js (flags a platform with 3+ recent dispatches and none ever completed).

moves.title: Intent routing → HTTP API (~300ms vs ~4-10s CLI)
moves.note: 2026-07-20: classifyIntent() in conversation.js tries the Anthropic Messages API first (~300ms), falls back to the CLI path automatically if ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is unset or the HTTP call fails. Craig still needs to add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to secrets.env on the box for the speed-up to take effect.

moves.title: Confirm canonical Vapron repo; clean 3-checkout mess
